naming.tracked_documents: stable names under docs/, harness/, schemas/, Tests/, scripts/, or tools/

artifacts.purpose: Machine-readable inventory of required harness components and validation commands.
Human-readable statement of working components, known gaps, and proof ceilings.

artifacts.path: console output or CI log from Tests/survey/test_operational_harness_completeness_contracts.py
artifacts.purpose: Pass/fail proof that required harness components exist, are tracked, and are wired together.

artifacts.path: console output or CI log from scripts/check-repo-text-policy.py
artifacts.purpose: Proof that changed text blobs use normalized LF storage and contain no trailing whitespace.
Ignored local run context, registry, English report, summary, and handoff for synthetic harness proof.
Per-run inventory of source, generated, evidence, report, and handoff artifacts.

artifacts.consumption: clean local pipe and direct human review
artifacts.purpose: Clean local text handoff containing the human-readable next action, proof ceiling, failures, and artifact locations; it is not parser-facing evidence.
Compressed next-agent handoff with repo, branch, scope, validation, Git state, and next command.
